message:
refactor: deduplicate decoders, consolidate Thrift parsing, add tests (-162 lines)

- Share decodePlainValues across Lance and Parquet decode paths
- Add ThriftReader.readStruct/readListHeader, refactor all struct parsers
- Remove duplicate Thrift parser from parquet-decode.ts (use shared ThriftReader)
- Remove decodeBoolPages (handled by general decodePlainValues path)
- Deduplicate topK siftDown, simplify icebergTypeToDataType to lookup map
- Remove synthetic Footer workaround in master-do.ts
- Add 16 new tests (decodePlainValues, ThriftReader, Snappy, null bitmap, neq filter)
